title: Major Clothing Brand
metaTitle: Major Clothing Brand — Tailor's Tools · Artifact Digital
description: In-store tailor's tools for a global clothing brand — rooted in practitioner research, Sketchin Sessions, and a movement study. Live in 7 flagship stores.

card.blurb: A social platform for major clothing brand Taylors to share work and services with a global clientele.

lede: A one-hour conversation with a tailor at a leading clothing brand surfaced the daily workflow of the tailoring team and shaped a tool that now lives in seven flagship stores worldwide.

feature.caption: An in-store tool built around the tailoring team's real workflow — launched in seven flagship stores, starting in Shanghai.

pillars.title: Research with practitioners
pillars.body: A focused one-hour session with a working tailor mapped the day-to-day rituals of the team and the moments where they meet the customer.

pillars.title: Sketchin Sessions
pillars.body: We turned research into concepts fast, using rough wireframes to explore early ideas and lock alignment across the wider team.

pillars.title: Tested in motion
pillars.body: A movement study validated the interactions in physical space — proving the tool worked the way tailors actually move on the floor.

storyParagraphs: The work started with a single, deep conversation. One hour with a tailor at a leading clothing brand gave us a clear read on the daily practices of his team and the way they interact with customers in-store.

We moved from insight to idea through Sketchin Sessions — rapid-fire wireframe rounds that let us explore concepts in the open and get the team aligned before pixels got precious. As the direction sharpened, we ran a movement study to validate the interactions in physical space, then rolled out the final app across seven flagship stores worldwide — starting in Shanghai.
storyImageAlt: Major clothing brand tailor's tool — research and concept work
storyCaption: From practitioner research through Sketchin Sessions to global launch.

highlights.title: Grounded in practitioner research
highlights.body: One hour with a working tailor shaped the entire product.

highlights.title: Sketchin Sessions for rapid alignment
highlights.body: Wireframe rounds that turned ideas into shared direction.

highlights.title: Movement study in physical space
highlights.body: Interactions validated the way tailors actually work.

ctaHeading: Have a retail experience you want grounded in real users?
